palette: Rusted iron, mahogany leather, oxidized copper, and cool warehouse grey.
lighting: Amber-tinted warm hotel lobby lighting, casting long shadows across high industrial ceilings and heavy machinery.
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. A high-angle view looking down into the lobby of Hotel Emma, San Antonio. Heavy, rusted brewery machinery is repurposed as decor. Leather armchairs and mahogany tables. Warm amber lighting. Dust motes in the light beams. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. A tight close-up on a massive, rusted iron valve handle in a dark, industrial space. A faint glow from a distant laptop screen (unseen) reflects on the metal. The texture of the rust is hyper-detailed. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. Looking out a high, arched warehouse window at the San Antonio River Walk at dusk. The river is a ribbon of teal light. Neon signs of distant cafes are blurred. Rusted iron window frames in the foreground. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.
